parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'claude-sonnet-4-6', max_tokens: 900, system: 'You generate discovery call briefs for Kaya Geha at ALIF Agency Dubai. ALIF is a boutique creative + performance agency. Format in exactly 6 sections with bold headers: 1) Company Snapshot (2 sentences), 2) Why They Booked (signal context + what they said), 3) Likely Pain Points (based on ICP segment and industry), 4) Tech Stack & Ads (what they are running and gaps), 5) Best ALIF Proof Point (most relevant case study: Devolon for tech/D2C, Holz Concepts for retail, Flow Meditation for wellness/lifestyle), 6) Suggested Opening Line (one sentence Kaya can say to open the call). Keep the whole brief under 350 words. Concrete and specific.', messages: [{ role: 'user', content: JSON.stringify({ company_name: $json.company_name, prospect: $json.prospect_name + ', ' + $json.role, region: $json.region, icp_segment: $json.icp_segment, signal_type: $json.signal_type, signal_date: $json.signal_date, industry: $json.industry, employee_count: $json.employee_count, fb_ads_running: $json.fb_ads_running, engagement_rate: $json.avg_engagement_rate, tech_stack: $json.tech_stack, they_said: $json.biggest_challenge, meeting_time: $json.meeting_time_formatted }) }] }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ action: 'update_deal', deal_id: $json.kommo_deal_id, email: $json.prospect_email, fields: { stage: 'discovery_scheduled', discovery_date: $json.meeting_time, calendly_uuid: $json.calendly_uuid } }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ text: `⏰ *POST-CALL CHECK-IN*

Your call with *${$json.prospect_name}* @ *${$json.company_name}* was ~2 hours ago.

Quick actions:
1️⃣ Log discovery score in KommoCRM (Stages → Discovery Held)
2️⃣ If qualified (≥4.0): I'll auto-generate the proposal in 30 mins
3️⃣ If not qualified: Move to Lost or Nurture

📋 Deal: ${$json.kommo_deal_id || 'find in CRM by email'}`, channel: $env.SLACK_CHANNEL_KAYA }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ name: 'ALIF Agency — ' + $json.company_name + ' Proposal — ' + $json.proposal_date, template_uuid: $json.currency === 'AED' ? $env.PANDADOC_TEMPLATE_AED : $json.currency === 'GBP' ? $env.PANDADOC_TEMPLATE_GBP : $env.PANDADOC_TEMPLATE_USD, recipients: [{ email: $json.prospect_email, first_name: $json.prospect_first_name, last_name: ($json.prospect_name || '').split(' ').slice(1).join(' '), role: 'Client' }], tokens: [ { name: 'prospect_name', value: $json.prospect_name }, { name: 'company_name', value: $json.company_name }, { name: 'audit_finding_1', value: 'Creative fatigue — current ads have been running 60+ days without refresh' }, { name: 'audit_finding_2', value: 'Website mobile score below 60 — losing paid traffic on mobile checkout' }, { name: 'audit_finding_3', value: 'No consistent brand identity across Instagram + paid channels' }, { name: 'recommended_tier', value: $json.recommended_tier }, { name: 'tier_1_price', value: $json.tier_1_price }, { name: 'tier_2_price', value: $json.tier_2_price }, { name: 'tier_3_price', value: $json.tier_3_price }, { name: 'case_study_industry', value: $json.case_study_industry }, { name: 'case_study_result', value: $json.case_study_result }, { name: 'currency_symbol', value: $json.currency_symbol }, { name: 'proposal_date', value: $json.proposal_date }, { name: 'expiry_date', value: $json.expiry_date } ] }) }}
